label: Em Dm Carry
signal: Rotate to the higher-carry of the EM and DM equity baskets (top 25% by 9m carry).
description: Rotates between EM and DM equity baskets on relative carry/momentum: v2 canonical = top 25% by 9m carry, 5% threshold, semi-annual rebalance (grid of 240 combos). ETF proxy universe (EEM/INDA/EWZ/... vs SPY/QQQ/IWM/MDY); true country-level carry needs WRDS country returns (todo log).
reference: Proprietary — EM vs DM equity carry within the Koijen et al. (2018) carry framework
